author: Your Name
_writingSample_note: Use writingSample (single string) OR writingSamples (per content-type map)
writingSample: A paragraph showing your natural writing voice. Short sentences. Specific observations. Injected into AI prompts to match your tone.

writingSamples.guide: Your voice sample for destination guides — practical, first-person, specific prices.
writingSamples.review: Your voice sample for reviews — honest, comparative, concrete recommendations.
writingSamples.itinerary: Your voice sample for itineraries — day-by-day structure, timing advice.
writingSamples.default: Fallback voice sample used when content type does not match above keys.

_gsc_note: gscPagesCsv/gscQueriesCsv are fallbacks — SeoFlow prefers the live GSC API via ADC
_domain_note: Set these to match your content domain — used in AI prompts and image search
_aiLimits_note: Protects against runaway AI costs in bulk runs
_publishPriority_note: Override built-in travel slug scoring — remove this block to use travel defaults
